# Project board workspace through the real CLI.
env PINAX_TEST_NOW=2026-06-21T15:30:00Z
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax project create research --name 研究 --notes-prefix research --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.create"'

exec pinax note add 看板任务 --project research --kind task --status active --body '正文不能进 card' --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'
stdout '"path":"research/看板任务.md"'

exec pinax note add 阻塞任务 --project research --kind task --status blocked --body 等待接口 --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'

exec pinax project board show research --note-display card --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.board.show"'
stdout '"project":"research"'
stdout '"next":"1"'
stdout '"blocked":"1"'
stdout '"note_display":"card"'
! stdout '"body"'

exec pinax note read research/看板任务.md --display card --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"display":"card"'
stdout '"excerpt"'
! stdout '"body"'

exec pinax note read research/看板任务.md --display detail --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"display":"detail"'
stdout '"excerpt"'
! stdout '"body"'

exec pinax note read research/看板任务.md --display context --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"display":"context"'
stdout '"excerpt"'
! stdout '"body"'

exec pinax note read research/看板任务.md --display body --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"display":"body"'
stdout '正文不能进 card'

exec pinax project board configure research --columns inbox,next,doing,blocked,review,done --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.board.configure"'
stdout '"saved_path":".pinax/project-boards/research.json"'
exists vault/.pinax/project-boards/research.json
grep '"schema_version":"pinax.project_board.v1"' vault/.pinax/project-boards/research.json

exec pinax project board plan research --save --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.board.plan"'
stdout '"saved_path":".pinax/planning/project-boards/'

exec pinax plan weekly --taskbridge --dry-run --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"plan.weekly"'
stdout '"board_snapshot_id":"project-board-'
stdout '"board_next":"1"'
stdout '"board_blocked":"1"'

exec pinax project board export research --format markdown --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.board.export"'
stdout '## next'
stdout '看板任务'

exec pinax project item add research '今日到期' --column next --due-at 2026-06-21 --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.add"'

exec pinax project item add research '已经逾期' --column next --due-at 2026-06-20 --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.add"'

exec pinax project item add research '等待评审' --column review --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.add"'

exec sh -c 'mkdir -p vault/daily && printf "%s\n" "# 2026-06-21" "" "manual note" > vault/daily/2026-06-21.md'
! exec pinax plan daily --task-review --yes --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"managed_block_missing"'
grep 'manual note' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md

exec sh -c 'printf "%s\n" "# 2026-06-21" "" "manual note" "" "<!-- pinax:managed name=daily-task-review -->" "old review" "<!-- /pinax:managed -->" > vault/daily/2026-06-21.md'
exec pinax plan daily --task-review --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"managed_block":"daily-task-review"'
stdout '"writes":"false"'
grep 'old review' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md

exec pinax plan daily --task-review --yes --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"managed_block":"daily-task-review"'
stdout '"writes":"true"'
stdout '"today":"1"'
stdout '"overdue":"1"'
stdout '"blocked":"1"'
stdout '"review":"1"'
grep '## Daily Task Review' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md
grep '今日到期' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md
grep '已经逾期' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md
grep '阻塞任务' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md
grep '等待评审' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md
! grep 'old review' vault/daily/2026-06-21.md

exec pinax project item add research '实现 item flow' --column next --body 受控工作项 --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.add"'
stdout '"column":"next"'
stdout '"item_id":"item_'

exec pinax project item move research/实现-item-flow.md doing --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.move"'
stdout '"column":"doing"'

! exec pinax project item move research/实现-item-flow.md done --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"approval_required"'

! exec pinax project item move research/实现-item-flow.md done --yes --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"snapshot_required"'
stdout 'pinax version snapshot'

exec pinax version snapshot --vault vault --message checkpoint --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"version.snapshot"'

exec pinax project item move research/实现-item-flow.md done --yes --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.move"'
stdout '"column":"done"'

! exec pinax project item archive research/实现-item-flow.md --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"approval_required"'

exec pinax project item archive research/实现-item-flow.md --yes --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.item.archive"'
stdout '"column":"done"'

exec pinax api routes --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"api.routes"'
stdout '/v1/projects/{slug}/board'
stdout 'project.board.show'

exec pinax api schema export --format openapi --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"api.schema.export"'
stdout '"openapi":"3.1.0"'

# Long-term learning project pack through the real CLI.
exec pinax init learning-vault --title '学习炒股的全部笔记' --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax project learning init investing stock-learning --title '学习炒股的全部笔记' --project-name '学习炒股' --notes-prefix notes/investing --preset stock-learning --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.learning.init"'
stdout '"project":"investing"'
stdout '"subproject":"stock-learning"'
stdout '"preset":"stock-learning"'
stdout '"notes.created":"3"'
stdout '"items.created":"4"'
stdout '"columns":"7"'
exists learning-vault/notes/projects/investing/stock-learning/charter/learning-charter.md
exists learning-vault/notes/projects/investing/stock-learning/sources/source-index.md
exists learning-vault/notes/projects/investing/stock-learning/retros/weekly-review.md

exec pinax project board show investing --subproject stock-learning --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.board.show"'
stdout '"column.learning":"1"'
stdout '"column.planned":"1"'
stdout '"column.retrospective":"1"'
stdout '建立交易术语表'
stdout '整理 K 线与成交量基础'

exec pinax template recommend --intent 'K线' --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"template.recommend"'
stdout '"primary":"learning.stock.indicator"'

exec pinax note add 'K线基础' --template learning.stock.indicator --project investing --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'
stdout '"template":"learning.stock.indicator"'
stdout '"kind":"learning"'
stdout '"tags":"learning,stock,indicator"'

exec pinax index refresh --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.refresh"'

exec pinax search 'K线' --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.search"'
stdout 'K线基础'

exec pinax project learning init investing stock-learning --title '学习炒股的全部笔记' --project-name '学习炒股' --notes-prefix notes/investing --preset stock-learning --vault learning-vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"project.learning.init"'
stdout '"notes.created":"0"'
stdout '"items.created":"0"'
